title: astragalus vegetior
intro: Astragalus vegetior, also known as Huang Qi in Chinese, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family and is native to China and Mongolia. The roots and stems of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, possessing anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties that help to boost the immune system and enhance overall health. The health benefits of Astragalus vegetior include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the body's natural defense against infections and diseases. Astragalus vegetior can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
